name: Navy Federal Credit Union cashRewards Secured

welcome_offer.description: No welcome offer. Secured card for building credit.

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 1% cash back on all purchases.

other_benefits.name: Collision Damage Waiver
other_benefits.description: Secondary CDW coverage when renting a car for 15 days or less.

notes: Formerly called 'nRewards Secured'. Renamed to 'cashRewards Secured' on April 2, 2025. Requires security deposit of $200-$5,000 (deposit = credit limit). After 3 months: eligible for CLI review. After 6 months: eligible for upgrade to unsecured cashRewards card.
